data.title: Peoples Bancorp Inc. CEO Douglas V. Wyatt retiring on April 3, 2026; Ron J. Majka named Chief Commercial Banking Officer.
data.description: In Marietta, Ohio on January 16, 2026, Peoples Bancorp Inc. revealed that Douglas V. Wyatt will be stepping down from his roles at the company and its banking arm, Peoples Bank, on April 3, 2026. Wyatt, who currently holds the position of Executive Vice President, has decided to retire after dedicated service. Peoples Bancorp Inc., trading on the NASDAQ under the symbol PEBO, made the announcement regarding Wyatt's upcoming departure.

data.title: MillerKnoll appoints Claire Spofford, former J. Jill CEO, to its Board of Directors. Zeeland, Mich, company aims for growth.
data.description: On January 16, 2026, in Zeeland, Michigan, MillerKnoll (NASDAQ: MLKN), a small-cap value company focused on growth in industrial and consumer sectors, announced the appointment of Claire Spofford to its Board of Directors. Spofford, a seasoned retail executive with over three decades of experience, will bring valuable expertise to the company.

data.title: Sensient Technologies (NYSE: SXT) declares $0.41 dividend per share to be paid on March 2, 2026, for shareholders as of Feb 3, 2026.
data.description: In Milwaukee, the Board of Directors of Sensient Technologies Corporation (NYSE: SXT) has announced a regular quarterly cash dividend for its common stock at $0.41 per share. The scheduled payment date for this dividend is March 2, 2026, for shareholders on record as of February 3, 2026. Sensient Technologies Corporation is a prominent worldwide producer and promoter of colors, flavors, and various specialty ingredients. Utilizing cutting-edge technologies and a strong global presence, Sensient offers innovative solutions in the market.

data.title: New Jersey American Water files rate request for $1.4 billion investments, customer assistance, and tax savings return.
data.description: On January 16, 2026, New Jersey American Water submitted a proposal to the New Jersey Board of Public Utilities (BPU) advocating for ongoing infrastructure investments, an extension of customer support programs, and a strategy to allocate tax-related benefits back to consumers.This initiative aims to enhance services and reinforce the company's commitment to serving its customers efficiently.

data.title: Sanmina Corp invites to Q1 fiscal 2026 earnings call on Jan 26, 2026, at 5:00 PM ET. Access via webcast.
data.description: Sanmina Corporation (NASDAQ: SANM) headquartered in San Jose, California, disclosed its plans for hosting the first quarter fiscal 2026 earnings conference call on January 26, 2026, at 5:00 PM ET. The event will offer a live webcast presentation alongside supporting materials.

data.title: International Paper declares a quarterly dividend of $0.4625 per share for Jan 1 to March 31, 2026, payable on March 17.
data.description: Today, International Paper announced a quarterly dividend of $0.4625 per share for the period spanning January 1, 2026, to March 31, 2026, on its common stock with a par value of $1.00. The dividend is payable on March 17, 2026.

data.title: Corvus Pharmaceuticals will unveil results from Cohort 4 of Soquelitinib trial for Atopic Dermatitis on Jan 20 at 8 AM ET.
data.description: The company will be conducting a conference call and webcast on Tuesday, January 20, 2026 at 8:00 am Eastern Time and 5:00 am Pacific Time. This event is scheduled to provide important updates and insights to investors and stakeholders. Make sure to mark your calendars for this significant event as it will be a valuable opportunity to learn more about the company's current status and future plans.

data.title: JPMorgan concerned as banks and crypto firms merge, with stablecoins yielding interest rates and ETF filings on the rise.
data.description: The convergence between banks and crypto firms is rapidly increasing as yield-bearing stablecoins, ETF filings, and tokenized markets push the limits of financial regulation. This trend is reflected in the growing numbers of partnerships and collaborations between traditional financial institutions and crypto companies.

data.title: McGrath RentCorp to release Q4 2025 financial results after market trading Feb 25, with conference call at 5 pm EST.
data.description: McGrath RentCorp, a top business-to-business rental company in North America, revealed intentions to disclose its financial outcomes for the fourth quarter concluding on December 31, 2025. The information will be made public after the regular market closures on Wednesday, February 25, 2026, with a conference call planned for the same day at 5:00 p.m. Eastern Time (2:00 p.m. Pacific Time) to delve into the fourth quarter performance. McGrath RentCorp trades on Nasdaq under MGRC.

data.title: Fogo Mainnet launches featuring Wormhole Bridge; FOGO token plunges 9% to $0.037 amidst volatility. Block times set at 40ms.
data.description: Fogo has recently introduced its Layer 1 mainnet utilizing SVM technology, integrating Wormhole and offering 40ms block times tailored for DeFi traders. The FOGO token is currently trading at $0.037 amidst fluctuations accompanying the launch.
